name: Mock Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine minced garlic, tomato paste, finely chopped onions, rosemary, water, oregano, and beef ground in a bowl.
2. Stir in 1/3 cup parmesan cheese and 1/3 cup parsley until well mixed.
3. Cook the pasta according to package instructions and drain well.
4. In another bowl, mix vegetable oil, remaining 1/3 cup parsley, chopped spinach, bread crumbs, 1/3 cup parmesan cheese, beaten eggs, garlic salt, and ground sage.
5. Arrange a layer of pasta at the bottom of a baking dish.
6. Spread a layer of the spinach mixture over the pasta.
7. Add another layer of the meat mixture on top.
8. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, finishing with the meat sauce.
9. Sprinkle any remaining parmesan cheese and parsley over the top.
10. Bake at 350°F for 20-30 minutes, or until heated through and lightly browned.
